event_type: exec_create: python -c import requests, json; r=requests.post('http://obs-ollama:11434/api/chat', json={'model':'llama3.2:1b','messages':[{'role':'user','content':'hello'}],'stream':False}); print(r.status_code); print(r.text)

exec_start: python -c import requests, json; r=requests.post('http://obs-ollama:11434/api/chat', json={'model':'llama3.2:1b','messages':[{'role':'user','content':'hello'}],'stream':False}); print(r.status_code); print(r.text)
exec_create: sh -c echo "--- ENV ---"; env | grep OLLAMA; echo; echo "--- CODE ---"; sed -n "233,248p" /app/app.py
exec_start: sh -c echo "--- ENV ---"; env | grep OLLAMA; echo; echo "--- CODE ---"; sed -n "233,248p" /app/app.py
exec_create: grafana cli admin reset-admin-password admin
exec_start: grafana cli admin reset-admin-password admin
